{{Quote|They say you had to kill an Icarii seven times, an' even that might not be enough.|Beez|<ref name="EOTE1">[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]]</ref>}}
The '''Icarii''' were a [[near-Human]] species native to [[Vestar/Legends|Vestar]] who were wiped out in the so-called [[Icarii Campaign|Icarii campaign]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Lightning Battalion]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Nim]] and [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Abal Karda]]. Lightning Battalion employed a horrific biological agent to eradicate the Icarii after months of vicious fighting. Only [[Selestrine|one Icarii]] survived, later to be killed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

Imperial forces referred to the Icarii as '''Ikies''', a derogatory word. Due to the Icarii's unique biology, they could survive [[Dismemberment/Legends|dismemberment]], even decapitation and still remain alive. However, it was possible to kill an Icarii by severing the brain in half. A common phrase, brought on by these abilities was that you had to kill an Icarii seven times. The species had green blood.<ref name="eote3">[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 3|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 3]]</ref><ref name="eote4">[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 4|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 4]]</ref>
